locale.text: It was not easy to catch them, and at some point a doubt crept in – can I handle it? My persistence has been rewarded – the rare species of these parts are no longer endangered, and will be protected in the reserve.
A fisherman is going to part with his secret map of a hidden creek, if we manage to surpass his fishing mastery!

The smell of autumn leaves fills the air, while a thick mist covers the water's surface. We have no idea what challenges face us brave fishermen in this mysterious lake. Who knows, maybe you will be the one to solve the secret of the mythical monster?
Adds energy and allows for catching fish 20 percent larger
Catch some fish weighing 5 kg in total!
You'll also need some Gold to pay for the journey!

Volga zander are common zander relatives differing from them by the following: smaller sizes, absence of canine teeth on the mandible and the pre-operculum is fully covered by scale. Volga zander are generally freshwater fish residing in lower reach of rivers. Their basic food is carp and perch fingerling. Volga zanders longer than 15cms feed on solely fish. Due to the lack of canine teeth they are unable to snatch and swallow large prey (because of narrow their throat).
They say there is nothing better for catching perch than this small insect!
Use the Chopped Worm! The lure makes it easier to catch… anything in this river!
Catch fish weighing 6 kg in total! You'll need something to eat during the journey!
Holiday lure designed for winter fish catching.
Their body shape slightly resembles whitefish, but don't let it trick you, they are full-fledged Siberian trout! Their diet consists of insect larvae, earthworms and clams.
To unlock complete %d more achievements, on %s location.
Catch some fish weighing 5 kg in total!
Catch Tench on total weight [summ weight]
Now you don't need to carry a measuring tape to blow your own horn about the size of the biggest fish you catch! And once dried, this fish will help you to save on school supplies for your kid.
Lucky Bite - Catch any fish at least [weight]
Catch the leaf for the Uncle's herbarium!

The giant creature had been fooling the locals for several weeks. Every now and then, its vague silhouette was seen in the murky waters, yet no one could catch that monster. But for me, the situation wouldn’t have changed! I pitched in!
A laboratory studying Ciscos asks you to catch some from different habitats!
Catch fish for a certain total weight
Catch fish weighing 9 kg in total.
You can unlock Fish details by catching the fish or purchasing it for Gold.

Grayling are close relatives of salmon and whitefish. They inhabit clear cold water rivers and lakes, preferring reservoirs with pebbles and stony bottoms. Grayling can have fluvial, fluvio-limnetic and pure limnetic forms. The trademark of a grayling is its large flag-like dorsal fin, which is embroidered with a pattern of spots and stripes. Graylings are omnivores. Their regular food is bottom dwelling organisms - gammarus, shell-fish, larvae and other forms of water metamorphosing insects
I'm so sick and tired of all this fuss…
Catch an Arctic Grayling weighing 1.1 kg!
Locals have a tradition of decorating their bars with this fish. I smell a good opportunity to earn some money!
It is rumoured that some rods there are more convenient to use than others!
The National Zoo asks you to catch some particular fishes!
Haul up your net - it's full of fish!
It's time to test our equipment on the new place!
A lab asks you to catch some Nases from different habitats!
Wildwood Master - Get all achievements on Wildwood Pool
A cheap spinning lure for rookie anglers. Its benefits are lightness and compactness. As for disadvantages, its spinning lacks durability and is not designed to carry a heavy reel.
We need to try hard for Honey Shore inhabitants not to be left without Christmas!
Skilled Fihserman - Get all achievements on Honey Shore
Send some silver on delivering ball-fish to various locations!
Catch Drytails on total weight [summ weight]
Silver spent on purchases will be used for making new bells!

We have put in place reasonable technical and organizational measures designed to secure your personal information from accidental loss and from unauthorized access, use, alteration or disclosure. However, we cannot guarantee that unauthorized third parties will never be able to overcome those measures or use your personal information for improper purposes. Also please note that email and messaging systems are not considered secure, so we discourage you from sending us personal information through these mediums.
Catch some Carps in the Mountain Lake!
For agile and voracious predators like grass pike you should always take leech, that's for sure!

Round goby are a benthic species preferring lightly-salted coastal areas of seas with a depth of 10-17 ft, but they also inhabit rivers, reservoirs and lakes. They are notable for their immensely broad range of adaptation abilities. Round goby can survive in areas of low oxygen and possess the advanced ability to respire through their skin. They prefer solid stony ground but may be found on shell, sand or even muddy ground. They can obtain nutrition from a wide reange of sources, but their basic food is shell-fish, crustaceans and water plants.
Catch fish weighing 6 kg in total.
Cast your line several last times on the Northern Donets!
Your appeal in support was considered. Take as compensation this set of gold coins. Enjoy the game!
A world-famous spoonbait producer has modified its product and asks you to test it!
A cheaper equivalent of perch spoon. A bit of wit and even a scalpel can be a real spoon!

Representatives of the carp family. Not a fussy species - they'll eat almost anything; insects are their favorite breakfast. Although they are not marketable fish, they are often used as bait for catching larger, predatory fish.

How much may depend upon one man’s determination to do good? This fundraising campaign to protect local fauna started with my small donation, but it attracted public attention, and now the nature of these lands will be saved!
Change the lure to catch a fish quicker!
We will never post anything to your wall without your permission.
Catch Bersches weighing at least 0.8 kg!
Medium-sized predators, for instance, such as eel or pike like smaller fish. But to catch these fish for bait you have to be as good as them!
Catch some fish with Santa and listen to his story!
Catch an icy fish weighing 3.5 kg!
Catch Burbot weighing a specific total.
Bream are shy and smart fish, who stick together in small groups, often in the depths among thick algae. They are very tasty when fried or baked, but extremely bony, so be careful when eating them.
Catch the two major Fish Generals weighing not less than 0.7 kg.

Blue bream are river-lake fish. You will hardly ever find them in stillwater lakes and fast moving mountain rivers as they prefer silent stretches in large rivers and running lakes situated in river beds. Crustaceans, insects, worms and plants are the staple diet of adult blue bream.
The 3d rule: Catch some Verkhovkas weighing 8 kg in total!
Catch some Royal Fish in the Victory River!
Canned stew meat can be stored long-term. It can be used not only for eating, but also as a perfect feed.
Catch 2 fish weighing at least 0.1 kg each!
The National Zoo asks you to catch some rare local fish!
Help your friends to unlock new fishingspots!
Catch some Basses on the Honey Coast!
Catch fish weighing 6 kg in total.
Catch Cisco weighing a specific total.
The 1st rule: Catch as much fish as you can!

Baikal grayling feed on mainly caddis worms and adult caddis, stoneflies, scuds, or goby spawns during spawning time. They are very active fish. When moving up a river for spawning Baikal grayling can overcome rapid currents and even whirlpools. While hunting for flying insects Baikal grayling are able to jump up to half a metre out of the water.
Reliable classic model of Longlass class. Greater ring thickness provides additional durability. Large fish weighing 25 kg - the dream of any respectable fisherman come true!

We may use third-party advertising companies to serve ads on the Service. We do not provide any personal information to third-party advertising companies on a non-aggregate basis. Our system and the third-party advertising technology may use aggregate information, non-personal information, Drimmi's cookies on your hard drive and your use of the Service to target advertisements. In addition, advertisers may use other third-party advertising technology to target advertising on other sites. If advertisements are served to you, a unique third-party cookie or cookies may be placed on your computer. Similarly, third-party advertising companies may provide us with pixel tags (also called clear gifs or beacons) to help manage and optimize online advertising. Beacons enable us to recognize a browser's cookie when a browser visits the site on which is beacon is located, and to learn which banner ads bring users to a given site.
Local fishermen have got a picture of an incredible fish! We must catch it!

You have to visit a lot of picturesque fishing spots! Complete quests, net fish, sell your catch and share your achievements with friends! Find new places for fishing to become a real professional of fishing!

Bitterling is a fish with high laterally compressed body and large scales. Bitterling ordinary prefers ponds with stagnant or low flowing water. It feeds mostly with vegetarian diet: conferva, algae (diatoms), that is why, probably, its flesh has a bitter taste.

Stone loach live a abottom dwelling life. They prefer quite small fast-flowing rivers with a sandy or pebble bottom, but may be found in lower reaches of large rivers, lakes, salted waters of the Gulf of Finland, reservoirs and ponds. Stone loach burrow in silt for the winter, they are able to survive for a long time by staying in in wet ground after reservoirs have dried up. Stone loach feed on water invertebrates, insect larvae, plants and fish spawn.
A local Bersch Protection Fund asks for help!

They say this fish can understand human language and posses penetrating minds. Any aquarist dreams of having at least one beautiful arowana in their tank. Don't fry the arowanas, give them to good cooks instead.
Eels' release electric charges, their fiercest weapon, so be careful. Any attempt to catch these eels is like taking a bath with electricity!
Master of underwater communications, able to provide a signal in the most troubled waters.
How can I catch the fish I need?
Catch some fish weighing 7 kg in total.
Privacy and Protection of Personal Information
Catch some Gunner-Fish to raise a unit.
This season's special is grilled [fish type]! If you catch [total weight] it will be perfect!
Catch several Shads weighing 3 kg in total!
To unlock complete all quests at previous location

Conger eels differ from freshwater eel by their longer dorsal fin, complete absence of scales and their large size. Conger eels are voracious predators eating mainly small and medium-sized fish. Their mighty teeth easily crush mollusc shells. There are eyewitnesses who have seen conger eel tearing trapped fish out of nets. Their preferable habitats are rocky coasts where they hide somewhere in an underwater cave or crevasse and surprise their victims. Conger eels dig holes in sandy bottoms like river eels sometimes do.
Silver spent on purchases will go to the Fund!
Catch some Bitterlings weighing at least 0.2 kg!
Here we are! Just look, how bautiful this place is! Let's cast the line now!
Imitating shy whitebait, this lure moves jerkily from side to side. Any large predator will start chasing such easy meat right off bat - and will receive a shock!

Barb feed on mainly bottom dwelling organisms: shell-fish, worms, larvae and crustaceans. The distinctive features of a barb include two pairs of barbells at the corners of its mouth and head that aid in finding food on the river bed. Recently, the barb population has significantly decreased as a result of intensive fishing and pollution. Barb caviar is toxic.
Catch some Verkhovkas weighing at least 0.9 kg.
With amulet all fish will be bigger! Forever!
This one was something! But now it's my personal pride!
Catch some Signalfish to form a signal detachment!

After the stunning success on the Forest River, we were not going to rest on our laurels. Two days later, we were made to feel welcome in Honey Beach – the locals, who had heard a lot about our feats, were ready to render us all sorts of assistance.

Chipper is a small river fish, the largest specimens of chipper are rarely longer than 4 inches. And females are larger than males. This fish color is mottled but not bright, the basic tone is gray, light yellow or brown, on which are scattered small dark spots. It lives exclusively in clean waters. Chipper eats small invertebrates. Chipper prefers sandy-clayey soil, in which it can easily hide itself.
You'll also need some Gold to pay for the journey!

Professional tackle of the "Bear" series, best rod on the market! The price is moderated by high quality and reliability - titan rod will never break. Allows you to catch any fish, without weight limit!
Holiday bait designed for winter fish catching.

Strong, active predators. Their jaws make a dangerous weapon. They like large spaces and water reservoirs. Small fish, mollusks, shrimps and other shellfish are their favorite delicacies. We advise to stock up with more of those before fishing!
Catch more fish than the forester!
Catch some Blue Breams weighing 0.8 kg in total!
Underwater battle is lost, and river general swims sadly near the shore. At the last moment a brilliant idea appears – the gunners can reverse the trend! But where to find them..?
Very rare member of bottle family. It can be found in waters with low content of hops, the degree of which does not exceed 15%
Although the Amur catfish does not have the bright aggressive features, it is an inexpressible hidden threat!

Ciscos inhabit cold oxygen-rich northern waters. They are not timind and need no speical care while fishing, especially in deep rivers and lakes. You should use caution around ciscos, as they feed on prey moving in schools and excessive splashing may scare away other species.
If you want to catch something larger than a ruff, the dragonfly is a good choice! Fishermen say that lake trout love dragonflies.
The deceptive lifelessness of this place couldn’t deter me. The quiet but deep waters were swarming with life, and my rivals knew it – the shore was full of those who wanted to try their luck.
Sometimes even the most experienced fishermen among the tranquil waters dreams about pint of refreshing drink.. JoyPint incredibly similar to the outlines of the mug!
You can found this incredible Ice Rod in the shop only on Christmas holidays. Though its origin is unknown, all real fishermen will be glad to purchase it!
Here we can find a rare leaf for the Uncle's herbarium!
It's so calm and silent here! Fishing there must be a delight!
I've found out there is a beautiful lake in nearby mountains... I wish I could see it!
It's time to replenish our stocks: we won't be able to catch anything without equipment!
Catch ball-fish weighing 10 kg in total!

The Service is not geared toward children under the age of 13 and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13. If we learn that a child under 13 has provided us with personal information we will delete such information from our files as quickly as possible.
Gold fish are blazing lake fish eating various invertebrates, water plankton and algae. Their sparkling gold-orange scale delights our eyes.
Catch fish weighing 1 kg in total.
Catch fish weighing 6 kg in total.
Invite friends and play with them!
National Zoo workers are amazed at the number of rare species inhabiting this area and ask you to catch more for them!
You're doing great! Now let's sell our catch!

A weird being was staring at me out of the water. I could barely make a couple of steps towards it when it disappeared into the murky depths of the lake. My heart was pounding – just a few moment before I had a chance encounter with the legendary Loch Ness monster!
Don't forget that a fisherman uses not only rods, but nets! Try and see how useful they are!

Pike are freshwater fish, sticking to water grasses at a certain depth in reservoirs. Adult pike enjoy a richly varied diet, which usually consists of a variety of fish species as well as mice, rats, curlews and squirrels crossing rivers. The largest pike are able to attack ducks. Pike meat is very tasty and good for people on a diet as it contains only 2-3% oil.
Pay some gold to buy a map of the new area.

Red-eye are often confused with another fish species, i.e. roach, but experienced fishermen know that the former differ from the latter by numerous signs, no need to look inside or under gills.A red-eye's scale is finer and has a golden shade. Also, these fish are thicker and fleshier, similar to breach rather than roach. Larger red-eye (above 1.76 lbs) gain deeper red color, sometimes their scale is filled with bloody color.

The most aggressive members of the perch family. Can be recognized easily by the peacock's eye at the base of their tails. Highly valued by fishermen worldwide! These hunters can even catch a low flying bird in their jaws.

Chum are anadromous red fish, the largest and most abundant species of Pacific salmon. Chum are valuable commercial fish. They spawn once in a lifetime, embarking on an amazing journey from the Pacific waters to mountain river heads. After spawning, chum die on their way back. Chum salmon are considered to be champion jumpers when heading upstream to spawn.
The white Amur is a purely phytovorous fish, feeding on aquatic plants. It is a commercial fish with a tasty, fatty meat, and is considered a valuable part of pond farming.
Let's contribute to the environmental protection and pull out an old rusty can from the water!
Catch a Ratan Goby weighing at least 0.7 kg!
There is a Fishing championship coming up on Thousand Islands! We must win!
Cast your line several last times on the Sand Ridge!

Chub are freshwater fish in the carp family. They feed on various types of food and are omnivores. Their food consists of insects, shell-fish, crayfish, frogs, fish spawn and fingerlings, as well as anything which falls into the water, even cherries. Large chub are extremely voracious predators, they not only swallow a lot of gudgeon and bleak, but they also snap up anything else foolish enough to venture into the water, including mice.
Let's go towards the beautiful Amazon! I wish I could get there immediately!
Catch an Amur Catfish weighing 3 kg.
Silver Amulet: Gives 15% increase to the weight of the catch!

Information collected from you is subject to the pertinent social network's policy. By using the Service, you may be granting your social network permission to share your e-mail address and any other personally identifiable information with Drimmi LLC. Please see Drimmi LLC's Privacy Policy for more information on the collection and use of your information. You acknowledge and agree that the Privacy Policy is incorporated and made part of these Terms.
The National Park asks you to catch some local species!
Become a pro fisherman. Catch a rare catfish!
CATCH 10 BIGEST SALMON ON ISLE SHORE FISHINGSPOT
An improved rod of the Nubler series. Using carbon as a material makes the tackle handy and allows you to catch fish weighing up to 3 kg.
The brewer said there are incredible fish living in this lake! Let's have a look!

Nets with cells 27-32 mm is usually used to catch medium-sized fish. In general these nets are designed for medium-sized herbivorous and omnivorous fish and small predators. Sometimes bigger fish can be caught with this net if it reels its tail into the net.

Sea lamprey are parasites. Their mouths are in the form of sucking discs with numerous keratose teeth. Using these teeth, sea lampreys stick to large fish - cod, flatfish, etc. The mouth produces chemicals to prevent the host's blood from clotting. The external slime of sea lamprey is toxic, so the most common way of cooking them is frying.
Sea chick", "River chicken" - call them what you like! This popular fish has huge economic and industrial significance. Omnivorous.
Catch some Gudgeons faster than Jessica.
To make the Christmas Tree look really festively, we need lots of decorations!
Hungry for Fish - Catch fish on total weight [summ weight]
Silver spent on purchases will go to the mirror-making plant!

The work was performed flawlessly. Even the professor nodded approval when examining the samples. That meant that the lab had everything we needed to assess the environmental situation in the region. That also meant that I was about to receive a handsome reward!
How do I win a mini-game?

These funny creatures can be noticed not far from Santa-fishes in holiday time.
Catch a Gudgeon weighing at least 0.13 kg.
Catch fish weighing 8 kg in total!
One of the most popular and simple baits for catching various young omnivorous fish. But it won't really help you catch something big.
Catch fish weighing 5 kg in total!

If you have been thinking that cakes cannot grow on trees or a perfect day for a banana-fish will never come, it's time to change your mind! This fish consists of sweet caramel that just melts in your mouth!
Silver spent on purchases will go to buy a cake for the farmer!
Look, how happy they are — Christmas celebration went well! Let's organize a Christmas competition!
Catch fish weighing 6 kg in total! You'll need something to eat during the journey!
Openerfish is very popular among locals. They are ready to pay for a catch of this wonderful fish!
To catch a fish, keep it inside the circle!
Uncle Joe said that when he was young he could break any local fishing record! Hm, can we do the same now?
This fisherboy alleges he can catch fish better than you! Challenge accepted!

American Catfish is very unpretentious in food. The native habitat - fresh waters of North America, in the region of the Great Lakes of Florida. The difference between it and ordinary catfish is small size and presence of 4 pairs of barbels.

Carp are large yellow-green and brown omnivorous fish, they have thick longish body covered by coarse, smooth, gold-green-grey-brown scale. Carp may live for 50 years or more. The average carp weighs 20 lbs, but it can reach 77 lbs. Carp eat almost without breaks because they belong to the group of stomachless fish. They are called "omnivore water spirits" and resemble pigs in their lack of discrimination regarding food choice, as well as their rapid growth and gluttony.

Drimmi's primary objective in collecting user information is to provide and enhance the Service and to enable users to easily navigate and enjoy the Service. When you install any of the Drimmi games or applications, we may collect and record the information you provide us voluntarily through www.facebook.com ("Facebook") and/or other social network(s) in accordance with the policies and terms of Facebook and/or other social network(s). The types of personal information collected in accordance with the activities listed above may vary depending on the activity. This "personal information" is defined as information about you that can be used to contact or identify you. Personal information may include: (1) your first and last name, (2) your profile picture or its URL, (3) your user identification number of the pertinent social network, which is linked to publicly available information such as name and profile picture (4) the login email you provided to the pertinent social network upon registration. Additionally, we may acquire information from you through (1) your access and participation in message boards on the Service (2) your email of a question to our customer support (3) your purchase of a virtual product of any type (4) other sources, including but not limited to newspapers and internet sources such as blogs, instant messaging services, other users of the Service to supplement your profile. Please note that because a third party site manages the purchases of virtual goods offered by the Service, we do not have access to your credit card details and billing information. Drimmi may also invite you to share non-personal information about yourself which may include but is not limited to: (1) your age or date of birth; (2) your gender; (3) information about the hardware you may own; (4) your favorite websites, friend information (such as friends of yours that are also connected to our Service) and fan pages; (5) your physical location and that of your access device (collectively referred to as "non-personal information"). If non-personal information is collected for an activity that also requires personal information, Drimmi may combine your non-personal information with your personal information in an attempt to provide you with a better user experience, to improve the quality and value of the Services and to analyze how our Service is used. The Service will also record game play information such as your high scores or game session duration. In addition to information collected as described above, you may choose to share additional information about yourself throughout the Service, such as in games or on message boards. Any actions you perform with other players are considered public, and are at your sole discretion. We may use your name, profile picture, email address and other information to notify you of new product releases, service notifications, and to solicit your feedback and input. Those emails will contain links for preference management and where appropriate, unsubscribe links should you decide you do not want to receive further emails. Finally, any time you access the Service, we may collect aggregate information including but not limited to internet protocol addresses, browser type, browser language, referring / exit pages and URLs, platform type, number of clicks, domain names, landing pages, pages viewed and the order of those pages, the amount of time spent on particular pages, and the date and time of this activity (aggregate information). We use this aggregate information to better tailor the Service to your interests, to provide you more efficient customer support, and to overall enhance the Service. We may use your name, profile picture and game play information to communicate with your friends that are also connected to the Service, which you can opt out by contacting us via email. We may also disclose information about you to our partners, such as our publisher Six Waves Inc., in order to provide the Service, resolve service problems and correct errors in the Service, to communicate with you about the Service, to provide you with advertising and promotional information in connection with the Service, and to enhance your experience on the Service. However, we do not give our partners an independent right to share this information. Due to our contractual obligations with these third parties and the need to share information to deliver and support the Service, we cannot provide you with the opportunity to opt-out of sharing information (whether personal information or non-personal information) with these third parties. Drimmi, certain of its partners, and each of their contractors and employees may view the information that you transmit to the Service to provide the Service and otherwise perform the tasks set forth in this Privacy Policy. In all cases of data access and collection, the information you provide will not be disclosed, rented, leased, loaned, sold, or otherwise voluntarily distributed to unaffiliated third parties and will be used solely for the purpose of providing you with and improving the Service.

By visiting or using the Service, you agree that the laws of Moscow, without regard to principles of conflict of laws and regardless of your location, will govern these Terms of Service and any dispute of any sort that might arise between you and Drimmi LLC. Any claim or dispute between you and Drimmi LLC that arises in whole or in part from your use of the Service shall be decided exclusively by a court of competent jurisdiction located in Moscow, and you hereby consent to, and waive all defenses of lack of personal jurisdiction and forum non conveniens with respect to venue and jurisdiction in Moscow. Drimmi LLC reserves the right to amend these Terms of Service at any time and without notice, and it is your responsibility to review these Terms of Service for any changes. Your use of Drimmi LLC following any amendment of these Terms of Service will signify your assent to and acceptance of its revised terms. YOU AND Drimmi LLC AGREE THAT ANY CAUSE OF ACTION ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THE SERVICE MUST COMMENCE WITHIN ONE (1) YEAR AFTER THE CAUSE OF ACTION ACCRUES. OTHERWISE, SUCH CAUSE OF ACTION IS PERMANENTLY BARRED.
The river general and his enemies are the real troublemakers! If you catch them – the river will live peacefully again – let's do it!
You can't miss the enhanced Elite version, which deserves a particular attention! This cult spinning can catch fish weighing 40 kg.
Buy the Chafer in the shop. No bait no fishing!

Sometimes you may catch something unexpected from the water! Here, for instance, are key fobs. Not only are they pretty objects, but the caught key could surprisingly open the door to a luxury car or a villa!
Catch Zonder on total weight [summ weight]
We have to get on to the Sunset Coast! Let's prepare to the journey properly!
Catch a Pike weighing at least 1.5 kg!
Catch more Amur Catfish than the fisherman.

When the silhouette of this giant flickered at the lake surface, it was absolutely clear that I had to catch it even if it would be the last thing I would do in my life! Our fight lasted for two weeks. My opponent was strong, but my skill and backbone finally prevailed!
We've stumbled upon a hungry native, who is ready to part with a pile of gold in exchange for freshly cooked fish soup!
Catch fish weighing 8 kg in total: we'll need food during the journey!
The citizens by themselves won't prepare for Christmas in time! Let's hurry up and help them!
Catch Lake Chars weighing 6 kg in total.
A festive bait, designed for catching Christmas fish.
River fish that like rocky riverbeds. When caught, their coloring changes to yellowish, making their previous silver shine disappear. Prefer fruits and other weeds for breakfast.

The new barrel-fish is a modern modification of the sword-fish! Its progress never stops, and the underwater world is also involved in gradual rearmament. This new upgraded 12.7-caliber cannoneer-fish fires up to 750 hatchlings per minute!
How can I unlock Fish details?
Catch a Ruff weighing at least 0.5 kg!
The impregnable monastery walls are towering white over me. I wonder if the sound of bells can scare away the fish... Let's check it out!
Decreases the number of points earned during the time left.
Hi! A deep pocket is amassing a collection of live fish, offering good money for [quantity] [fish type]! If you are on the shore with a rod, just try your luck!
Smart battalion fish knows no fatigue and understand the hardship of army life. But there's one thing they don't know - not every MRE is edible!
A popular type in Amazon, unique with one characteristic - they can emit loud and distinctive sounds by resonating their swimbladders. Have simple feeding needs, omnivorous.
Catch some Carps in the Loch Ness!
Roach are members of the carp family. They swim in shallow rivers, often hiding under the cover of outcrops, algae, and trees that hang down in the water. Dried or salted roach is a perfect snack!
A series of simple rods for people who are tired of catching small fish. This fishing rod is designed for fish weighing up to 2 kg.
A special bait for large predators is like catnip for kittens! If you want to catch a record catfish, there is no better bait!
Hurry up! Sale will end in %d %s
Catch Tenches weighing 3 kg in total.

Tube nosed goby are a benthic coastal fish. Usually tube nosed goby lurk under stones, hide in vegetation or burrow in the sand. They usually do not undertake large migrations, just moving from coast to deeper areas in winter. Tube nosed goby feed on fish, shell-fish, crustaceans, worms, etc. Like many other fish they can bear large variances in water temperature and drastic weather changes.
The National Zoo has opened an underwater section. They'll appreciate our help!
Catch rare Takifugu Rubripes at least [weight]
Catch some Ribbonfish to run the parade!
Prove to the local fishermen who rules the waters!
When fish don't bite and there is nothing to do, you may play cards caught in that very pond. But first, surely, you'll have to collect the whole pack.
A laboratory studying Mirror Carps asks you to catch some living in different habitats!
A laboratory is conducting a research and asks you to catch some fish from different habitats!

Burbot are large fish that feed on invertebrates and small fish. Burbot are night hunters, and are easiest to catch from dusk till dawn. They also like cold water and even spawn in the winter - around December-February. Burbot are relatively rare, shy and difficult to catch.

You can put this net to a depth of 6 meters. This net with strong and elastic multifilament canvas is ideally suited for catching big and active fish. The cells of this net too big to catch small fish.

Snakeheads are predators wh live among vegetation areas of rivers and lakes. They stick to shallow water and like to hide among snags and algae. Snakeheads feed on small fish, frogs, and insect larvae. An interesting fact: the snakehead needs to breath air, otherwise they die, even in clear water.

Crucian are quite small fish who inhabit boggy lowland lakes and rivers. They feed on plants and small invertebrates. Crucian are extremely hardy fish - being dormant they survive tough winters by staying close to the bottom.

Vimba prefer specific, deep places in summertime, and even more so in winter. Vimba schools moving upstream eventually gather in reservoirs. Catching these strong fish needs vast experience. The fish may be attached to the hook only by a thin membrane under the lip, so they can easliy slip off. A vimba often beats an angler by literally spinning around, insistently freeing themselves from the hook.

Nase are typical river fish eating organic remains that have settled on the bottom and various small creatures that crawl on the stony or hard sandy riverbed. The best nutritional conditions are at a medium depth of 1.3-5.9 ft, where the riverbed is covered by an alga carpet. Nase are shoaling fish that inhabit rapidly flowing deep water, often located near bridges.

Chipper is a small river fish, the largest specimens of chipper are rarely longer than 10 cm. And females are larger than males. This fish color is mottled but not bright, the basic tone is gray, light yellow or brown, on which are scattered small dark spots. It lives exclusively in clean waters. Chipper eats small invertebrates. Chipper prefers sandy-clayey soil, in which it can easily hide itself.

A cookie is a small data file that we transfer to your computer's hard disk, generally to quickly identify a user's computer and to "remember" things about the user's visit, such as your preferences or a user name and password. The Service sends cookies to your computer when you access or view content of a Drimmi game. Sky gazers are predatory fish that prefer to swim mainly in the mid waters. They can reach a length of 3.35 ft and weigh up to 20 lbs. Sky gazers feed on young crucians and ichs. Their diet includes insect larvae and dayflies during their mass swarming. The mouth of a sky gazer is directed upwards. After reaching 3 inch, sky gazers switch to eating fish that have a mainly oblong body shape.

Arctic char has silver color, with dark blue back and its sides are covered with rather large light spots. Arctic char lives in the cold northern lakes and rivers. In its appearance and way of life it is very similar to trout. Feeds on small invertebrates and other fish fry.

Freshwater eel have long patchy bodies and slippery fine scales. They are able to cover long distances, move overland along the grass wet with rain or dew and travel from one reservoir to another, therefore reaching flowing endorheic and closed lakes. Freshwater eel prefer slow flowing water, but may also be found in swiftly moving streams as well. They dwell in lower layers at various depths and at bottom ground in cavities. Freshwater eels hunt at night in shallow waters and eat insect larvae, shell-fish, frogs and small fish.

Upswimer are small freshwater fish. They resemble small bleak but have a wider body and head and a short lateral line. Verkhovka's favorite places are slow flowing small rivers, lakes, bottomland oxbow reservoirs, artificial ponds as well as pits with sandy and silty bottoms. Although verkhovka are small, they are voracious and omnivorous.

Perch are predators: the diet of an adult perch is largelymade up of other freshwater fish. Their habitat includes rivers, lakes, ponds, reservoirs and even lightly-salted sea areas. Perch prefer to stick to plain water basins, though they can sometimes be caught in high mountain reservoirs.

Volga zander are common zander relatives differing from them by the following: smaller sizes, absence of canine teeth on the mandible and the pre-operculum is fully covered by scale. Volga zander are generally freshwater fish residing in lower reach of rivers. Their basic food is carp and perch fingerling. Volga zanders longer than 0.5ft feed on solely fish. Due to the lack of canine teeth they are unable to snatch and swallow large prey (because of narrow their throat).

Amur carp have long been considered delicious. They are seen as valuable in many countries: for instance, in the East, Amur carp were a kind of standard measure for the value of things, and the addressing a person as "Carp" meant a compliment, similar to 'Dear' today. Amur carp are very spectacular fish and possess a number of merits such as stamina, adaptability, caution, a strong sense of smell, hearing, vision, "intelligence" and "wisdom" in their own way; they are worth close attention by fishermen.

Osman may be found in fast-moving river sources, both cold and warm springs, warm water and cold water lakes. In the summer osman reside in lakes and may be found everywhere from shallow waters down to 40m on stony or muddy ground among stonewort tousle. Young osman feed mainly on the larvae of midges and other insects. Osman bowels and caviar are toxic.

Gudgeon are quite small greenish-grey-brown-silver omnivorous fish. They feed on bottom dwellerss, shell-fish and the spawn of other fish. Gudgeon are often eaten by larger predatory fish.

Round goby are a benthic species preferring lightly-salted coastal areas of seas with a depth of 3-5 meters, but they also inhabit rivers, reservoirs and lakes. They are notable for their immensely broad range of adaptation abilities. Round goby can survive in areas of low oxygen and possess the advanced ability to respire through their skin. They prefer solid stony ground but may be found on shell, sand or even muddy ground. They can obtain nutrition from a wide reange of sources, but their basic food is shell-fish, crustaceans and water plants.

Coho have a thick head, wide forehead, and a very short and deep caudal peduncle. These features help to distinguish them from humpback salmon, chum, red salmon, spring salmon and masu salmon. In seas and during visits to rivers coho have silver shining scales. They have delicious red meat that contains vitamins, microelements and minerals important for humans. Their meat is almost free from small bones and ideal for children.

Silver crucians are close relatives of gold crucians, but have several differences including body shape, color and habits. The body of a silver crucian is not as long as that of a gold crucian, their silver sides sometimes have blackish touches and bronze tints. Silver crucians are very mobile, and inhabit both stagnant waters and slow flowing rivers.

Salmon or so-called salmo salar are one of the most famous, spectacular and tasty species of the salmon family. These surprisingly big fish can reach up to 50 ft long and weigh as much as 86 lbs. This fish wakes up only in the winter and hibernates in the summer. It bites well when fishing under the ice (as Chilly Willy will confirm). According to legend, this fish substitutes the Magic Goldfish at the Christmas Holidays, because the latter is drunk like a fish during this period.

The brewer accidentally dropped a collection beer bottle into the lake. He's going to fork out if someone could return it back.

Gold or yellow crucians are longstanding inhabitants of ponds, stagnant water lakes, oxbows and even small swamps. A gold crucian has a long, almost round body, red-copper sides and dark-red fins. Gold crucianscan reach 1.6 ft in length and up to 11 lbs in weight. In overpopulated reservoirs they become tiny - little larger than small coins. Gold crucians are known for their toughness and ability to live in habitats with little oxygen in the water.
Uncle Joe has lost his lucky card that he kept for years. We must find it at all costs!

Whitefin gudgeon are a very rarespecies and little is known about them. Unlike common gudgeon, whitefin gudgeon adults have long barbells, which reach their rear eye edge and have an unusual color. They are only rarely found in small rivers and in the upper course of medium rivers and have never been observed in ponds and lakes.

Stickleback are agile, schooling fish, living in both freshwater and seawater. Unfortunately, the fish has no commercial value and is used as poultry feed.

Omul feed on large crustaceans, young goby, cisco fries, smelt and Arctic cod in seas. When they are in areas with high plankton density, omul switch to eating planktonic crustaceans. Omul are oily fish. Large oil stores help them to survive severe winter conditions. .

Siberian roach are quite small fish that differ from common roach by their unusual color. They avoid cold and swift water or muddy ground, preferring clear and deep areas with still, warm water and a sandy-muddy or stony or argillaceous bottom. Siberian roach may be found near sunken shrubs, snags, among water vegetation close to the shore.

Black-backed shed are large fish with a dark-violet or almost black back and dark fins with well-developed teeth. Black-backed shed are predators feeding on mainly small fish. They can live for about 6-7 years. In the spring from March to April they head northward, mostly along western coasts in midsea areas.

A predator and the largest species in the cyprinoids family, named for the yellow-gold stains on its cheeks. The bigger a yellowcheek, the more colorful its cheeks. Yellowcheek's meat is very tasty, and real gourmets will surely appreciate this!

Belongs to the Beer-Vodka species, a member of the Oktoberfest family, mainly inhabits the drainage systems of brewery works. Must be consumed only with dark "Guinness", otherwise intoxication may occur!
Catch some ball-fish to decorate the Christmas Tree!

Carp are large yellow-green and brown omnivorous fish, they have thick longish body covered by coarse, smooth, gold-green-grey-brown scale. Carp may live for 50 years or more. The average carp weighs 9 kg, but it can reach 35 kg. Carp eat almost without breaks because they belong to the group of stomachless fish. They are called "omnivore water spirits" and resemble pigs in their lack of discrimination regarding food choice, as well as their rapid growth and gluttony.

Sabre fish prefer large rivers free from algae along with reservoirs and big lakes. In the daytime they float at mid water level or near the surface, at nighttime they sink to significant depths. When frosts arrive sabre fish swim down into cavities and deep places. They feed on mainly insects and their larvae as well as worms and fingerling.

Siberian grayling are the most widespread freshwater fish of the Northern Hemisphere. They can live in streams, rivers and large rivers (in mountains and tundras), oxbows, and also lakes of different types: from deep clear glacial lakes to small tundra lakes. As with other salmon, Siberian graylings are sensitive to water clarity and water oxygen concentration, which is why they are more frequently found in streams and foothill rivers, in cold lakes in the southern areas of their range.

Amur catfish are a smaller relative of the common catfish. They are freshwater predators but can also be found in lightly-salted water. Amur catfish inhabit slow flowing waters, and in the summertime stick to arms on spates, in shore zones. In the autumn they leave for deeper reservoir areas, where they live a sedentary life. Amur catfish are valued for their outstanding gastronomic qualities: their tasty medium-fat meat with no bones.
Lake Paly looks like a trout, but do not be fooled - in his heart it is the most natural char. It only lives in a lake and rarely noticed in the river.

Vendace mainly inhabit lakes, are less commonly found in rivers, but are also caught in cold European seas. They prefer clear sandy or loamy bottoms and swim in lakes mainly in depths that allow them to avoid water that is too warm. Despite their small size, vendace are a desirable catch. They can be eaten fresh, salted or smoked and their caviar is also edible.

Tench are quite large fish, which prefer to stick to silent river banks, oxbows, and quiet channels filled with underwater plants. They tend to be found in large rushes or reeds in lakes and murky ponds. Tench eat a lot of different types of food.

Trout are very peculiar fish. They are extremely shy, therefore you need to be very careful when approaching the bank. Trout are so fussy that it is extremely hard to select the right bait. Usually, trout inhabit small swift rivers full of crystal clear water, numerous obstacles,and habitats which are inaccessible or swampy. An interesting fact: trout are introduced into wastewater filtration systems, because they are sensitive to pollution. If toxic substances appear, these fish perish first. This is a type of natural warning system.

A monstrous creature, the terror of the deeps. Looks suspiciously like certain extinct species... This predator eagerly attacks whales and sharks, although it will eat anything it finds. Apparently, this miraculously preserved giant gave birth to the Loch Ness legend.

Catfish are active night predators preferring to wait out the daytime in cavities, under snags and floating rush isles. The diet of younger catfish includes small crustaceans, hatchlings and water insects. Older catfish prefer eating live fish and other freshwater creatures as well as shell-fish, depending on what's available. Catfish can grow extremely large - the largest documented catch was 952 lbs!

Ruff are rather small bottom dwelling fish, which are not very fussy in terms of food and habitat selection. They feed on small fish, invertebrates, and algae. The dorsal fin of a ruff has sharp spines, so be careful when taking a ruff off your hook!

Grass pike, unlike their larger relatives, deep-water pike, hunt close to surface, rather than near the bottom. Laying in dense algae, a grass pike waits for a fish swimming by and then pounces. That is why they are easy to catch with a bright lure skillfully launched near reeds.
Earn some silver: we'll need money for the future!
A local tribe has announced a competition to find the best fisherman. We've been invited to participate!

There was not a single person for miles around. Despite the fact that I had to struggle through dense thickets, I was smiling. I was the first to reach that lost backwater!

Don't be in a hurry to get rid of the old boots and shoes you catch. What if, after fishing out one shoe from a pair you later catch the other? It could make a great present for your mother-in-law on her birthday!

These delicacies have numerous historical roots - they were even bred by ancient Romans! Until now, they are still the favorite fish of coastal nations. In turn, dorado favor shellfish and mollusks.

It's time to compete with the best local fishermen. Let the most able one win!
The neighbor has returned from fishing, bringing [quantity] [fish type] weighing at least [weight] each. Wanna fight?
A cheaper equivalent of Shellfish spoon. A part of flatware that can be useful for a fisherman not only for dinner !
Remember how we used to catch [fish type] together? Let's recreate those times and get [quantity]!

Although Ide are freshwater fish, they can live in the lightly-salted waters of estuaries. They inhabit rivers and lakes, preferring gently flowing deep backwaters with loamy ground, they feed on prey moving to strong current areas. Ide are omnivores and feed early in the morning. Their diet consists of vegetables and animal food (insects, shell-fish and worms).
What do I have to do?

The set of fished-out toy soldiers might be presented to your little son on his birthday, and the money you save could be spent on a new fishing rod or used to linger over drinks with your friends in a pub!

Common carp usually feed on water plants, the spawn of early spawning fish and frogs in the spring and early summer. In the summertime their diet slightly changes - the basic food at that time includes water insects, worms, small snails, spatterdocks, molting crayfish, small leeches, etc. Common carp are long-living fish, some species living as long as 35-40 years.
Catch Sturgeons weighing 8 kg in total!
Put on the amulet and all fish will be 10% bigger!
Olive Catfish is a quite popular object of fishing, highly regarded for the taste of meat. It lives in rivers and lakes of North America. This predator, able to reach up to 1.5 meters in length.
Catch a roach weighing at least 0.1 kg. Hints below will show you what to do!
Local fishermen tell each other stories of a giant ruff. Many have seen it in cloudy waters, but no one managed to catch it!
Cast your line several times for a great fishing!

Dear players! During the latest updates in the game have been many changes that could affect the gameplay and maintaining progress of the players. We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused and would like to make a gift for You. Have a nice fishing! Sincerely, the team Gone Fishing.
It seems, local cooks like fish dishes... I smell an opportunity to earn some money!
What do I need lures and baits for?
Catch some fish weighing 7 kg in total.
Let's give some fish to the guardian of the lake in order to win his favour!
The lab is conducting an urgent research and needs some Basses from different habitats!
It was too hot there, it's high tome to go into some cool coniferous forest! Let's go to the Fir Coast!

The boss at the bottom of the sea! The Commander-In-Chief over cannoneer-fish and seahorses. It is difficult to catch, because it is always escorted by bodyguards. It tastes pretty good, but is a bit tough…
Locals want to organize an open-air festival, but they need some fish dishes!

Asps inhabit rivers, avoiding stagnant waters. They prefer to float close to the surface. Young asp fish feed on worms and insects, adults also eat small fish. Having toothless jaws, asp catch small fish usually by knocking them unconscious and then simply picking them up.
Catch the right amount of perch!
Catch some Blue Breams on the Honey Coast!
Catch an Olive Catfish weighing 0.35 kg!
Use some bait to alarm a signal detachment!

Flat bream are shoaling fish in the carp family, related closely to bream. With a silvery, heavily side-flattened body they are reminiscent of young bream. Flat bream differ from common bream only by the number and location of teeth. They have seven teeth in two rows.

Minnow inhabit fast flowing cold water rivers. They are the most important source of food for predatory fish. Somelake minnows have been kept in aquariums, but this is not possiblee for river minnow, as they need flowing water. Lake minnow bear low water oxygen and water oiliness well. They feed on gnat-worms, small flies, and breadcrumbs.
Login to play with your friends
Some locations still wait for Christmas to come! We need to go there and bring the Spirit of Christmas with us!
These incredible creatures can resist the lowest temperatures. Ice fish can survive in the coldest corners of the world.

Despite being the largest members of the sturgeon family, they mainly feed on seafloor crustaceans, mollusks and small fish. The Atlantic variety could be considered the grandparents of the Sturgeon family, since they can reach100 years old. A critically endangered species, we don't advise fishing them up in real life..

Baikal whitefish unlike other lake whitefish have low-height body and dense scales. Their main habitats are shallow waters with sandy ground. Adult Baikal whitefish feed on shell-fish, benthic gammaridea, planktonic crustaceans, insect larvae, worms, and young goby.

Norway haddock closely resemble perch in the shape of their body, however they are actually so different r that Norway haddock belong not only to another family, but to another order of spiny-finned fish. Coastal Norway haddock prefer to live where there is algae and stay in a small area without roaming far. They catch their prey - small fish, large crustaceans and other invertebrates swimming over the bottom - suddenly ambushing their prey.
Wow! Do you see that, too? That's a fish wearing Santa costume! We need to catch it immediately and send to our laboratory!
Moving under the water, this lure looks exactly like a large stream-driven worm. When seeing this tasty prey, most omnivorous fish immediately attack!
Before we start fishing on a new spot, let's try to cast a line several times!
Parasites, favoring large rivers and preferring a concealed way of life. Hooking a Lampern is a real rarity. They mainly feed on detritus and algae, but also sometimes small worms.

By the quantity of empty bottles one may assess the number of people who like to drink alcohol while fishing. And sometimes you may even catch a sealed bottle among the variety of empty ones! It's up to you what to do with this water gift - place it on a shelf as a memento or risk tasting it!
Catch Pike on total weight [summ weight]
Catch some Ruffs in the Forest River!

Humpback salmon are a species of anadromous fish in the salmon family. They are the smallest and most abundant species of Pacific salmon. Humpbacks are a valuable commercial fish species. Their meat is used for soup, braising, frying, salting and canning. Humpback caviar is also used in cookery for canning after salting.
Medium rod of the Longlass series. Needless to say, the quality and reliability of the tackle in this series are excellent. This tackle also allows you to easily catch fish weighing up to 35 kg.
The cat is such a fussy eater, it won't eat every kind of fish! Catch [quantity], it loves [fish type]!
Rise and Shine. It's fishing time! New level up in Gone Fishing!
Old beat-up rod from someone's attic. Allows you to catch the smallest fish. The fishing rod is slimpsy, so the rod is only for fish weighing up to 0.5 kg.

Zander are typical ambush predators. They feed on fish, and younger species and also eat water invertebrates. They are very sensitive to oxygen concentration in the water and to the presence of suspended solids, which is why they avoid boggy reservoirs. Zander are active both day and night, but in the daytime they stay in shallow waters andat night move to deeper places. Zander meat is considered good for people dieting as it is full of protein and contains only a small amount of oil.
Catch an American Catfish weighing 1.3 kg!
The lab is conducting a comparative research and needs some Eels from different habitats!
The 2nd rule: Catch some Sabrefish weighing 0.5 kg!
Catch Rare Sky Gazer at least [weight]
That's not fair! The students of local school are left without Christmas… We need to help them!

Short, dense body of this fish is covered with dull scales of medium size. Coloration is variable, dominated with gray-green and dirty brown color. Rotan – is a predator that eats fish spawn and fingerlingsleeches, newts, tadpoles. In a small pond rotan is becoming numerous and able to completely wipe out other species of fish.
It's so beautiful here, like on a movie screen! I can't wait to catch the first fish!
You come across the abandoned pieces of a rod in the lake. They can definitely be reassembled!

What are the Game Settings and how to change them?

Shemaya is a genus of the carp family. Shemaya feed on crustaceans, insects, their larvae, worms and plankton. After reaching maturity at the age of 2-3, shemaya repeat the path of their parents. Shemaya are well-known for the taste and tenderness of their oily meat and they are most valuable commercial fish of the carp family. They are called "shah mague" (i.e. royal fish) in Persia.
Even the most experienced fishermen know that the right choice of tackles is half the battle. Let's prepare for fishing properly!
Catch a Goldfish weighing at least 0.43 kg!
Cast your line several last times in the Victory River!
After a couple of hours the river has changed remarkably – the thankful inhabitants celebrate the end of the war joyfully jumping out of water!

A can is the perfect place to store various types of bait! Don’t you know that? This is a time-tested old fishermen-proved method! Some anglers even collect lucky cans containing the bait that always makes fish bite!
Look, there's a barrel floating near the coastвЂ¦ Ah, it's a Barrelfish! Let's catch it now!
Huh? What is it there underwater? Ha! These are Golden and Silver Crucians! I know someone who can pay handsomely for them!
Fishing is not a sport - it's a way of life! New level up in Gone Fishing!
Catch fish weighing 6 kg in total! You'll need something to eat during the journey!

Lake trout do not migrate, but stay in reservoirs for breeding and maturing. Lake trout may be found everywhere - in small mountain streamlets, flood rivers and powerful flowing rivers. Lake trout are strongly attached to their territory, especially those inhabiting rivers. Once a fish finds a place with an abundance of food it aggressively wards off any competitor daring to approach too closely. Lake trout choose positions which they consider most convenient and start hunting: they snatch insects, their larvae (stoneflies etc) and small crustaceans drifting by.
An environmentalist wants to buy back all the fish we catch to release it!

Salmon or so-called salmo salar are one of the most famous, spectacular and tasty species of the salmon family. These surprisingly big fish can reach up to 1.5 m long and weigh as much as 39 kg. Their regular diet usually includes such small creatures as crustaceans and other small-sized ocean fish.
Pirate Perch - the only type of fish with a "chemical" camouflage, making it invisible for the fish. Spend mostly solitary life and loves to hunt at night.
A local hospital needs some toxin, which can be extracted only from a Shad, to prepare a medicine!
Catch Barrelfish weighing 6 kg in total!
Put some silver in the Christmas money box!

There is nothing better than [fish type] cooked by a skilled chef! Catch [total weight] and find out for sure!
Catch Chub on total weight [summ weight]
A friend of yours needs an impressive catch to make an impression on the barwoman in the inn!
Catch some Ciscos in the River Valley!

Bleak are small shoaling fish that live in almost in every river, lake or reservoir. They are characterized by loose scales that remain on your fingers when you touch them. Bleak are not particularly tasty.

A fast coldwater river full of various types of fish and other river creatures flows through this sun-drenched green valley! Surely, it's better to come here with the whole family. It will be difficult for a lonely fisherman to catch and carry all those fish!
Catch some Marbled Sculpins weighing at least 0.12 kg!
Local Zoo offers a reward for a set of fancy-dressed fish! Catch them all!

Buddy, I've heard from my pals that there is a huge [fish type] somewhere over there! My friends are frettng that it will be caught by someone else. Now’s your chance, get it first!

Small [fish type] are delicious. If you catch [quantity], I will cook them, yummy!
It's time to leave this beautiful place for now. We haven't visited other corners of the world yet!

Sometimes very beautiful leaves can be found in the water - they are worth using in a fine herbarium or drying between book pages for souvenirs.
Catch some Crucian Carps weighing at least 0.4 kg.
Every skillful fisherman knows that if you plan to catch large river fish, there is nothing better than a grasshopper! One problem - this jumping bait also has to be captured.
It's time to test our equipment on the new place!
Superior and professional rod with rings made of high module carbon. For amateurs of large and rare fish!
Catch fish weighing 4 kg in total: that will look well as addition to Carps!
Laboratory assistants can't explain the sudden apparition of ball-fish and ask us to catch some samples!
A cheaper equivalent of a Live Bait. The construction of several segments creates a false impression of a small fish in dirty water.

Spend some gold to buy equipment: we'll need it!
"...go on a journey all alone. Fancy joining me?"
There's a guy's boasting about the [fish type] he's caught, I saw it, it's massive! But I believe in you – you can catch a bigger [fish type]!
This underwater balloon is pretty tasty, especially when baked in a real Russian stove. And when correctly dried it imakes an excellent exotic Christmas tree toy.
Twilight is approaching. Night fish are on the hunt!

Baikal sturgeon are evolutionarily the most ancient and largest fish of Lake Baikal. They are the only type of cartilaginous fish in Baikal, forming here a special subspecies. The color of a sturgeon varies from light-brown to dark-green-grey-brown, although the underside is always light. Small bony plates of various forms in between five rows of bony bucklers are situated along the body of a sturgeon. Baikal sturgeons feed on insects, young fish and invertebrates.
Catch some fish weighing 5 kg in total!

Red-eye are often confused with another fish species, i.e. roach, but experienced fishermen know that the former differ from the latter by numerous signs, no need to look inside or under gills.A red-eye's scale is finer and has a golden shade. Also, these fish are thicker and fleshier, similar to breach rather than roach. Larger red-eye (above 800 g) gain deeper red color, sometimes their scale is filled with bloody color.
Tireless Fisherman - Get all achievements on Secret Backwater
We need to catch some herrings for a Christmas dish!
Ho ho ho! Go fishing with me, I have plenty news for you!
Earn some silver — it can help you to solve many problems!
Catch the most important General-Fish weighing 0.9 kg – this is a local leader!

You can put this net to a depth of 6 meters. This net with strong and elastic multifilament canvas is ideally suited for catching big and active fish. The cells of this net too big to catch small fish.
Catch some Nases in the Hidden Creek!
This is an experience scale! Get experience and receive rewards!
A fantastic example of evolutionary inventions in industrial fishing! Nubler received another upgrade and allows you to catch 2,5 kg fish.
What do I need different fishing rods for?
In the night strange creatures wake up in the river... You have to catch them in order to stop scare local people!
Oh, Lord... Finally I've caught what I want!
Winner - Get all Victory River location achievements
A farmer from the lodge near the river invited us politely to partake in fishing... One cannot refuse!
Alga is the perfect bait for Mirror carp in particular. But don't expect a predator like a pike to be impressed!

Tired of river fish? Bored of fishing from the shore? The time has come to go sea fishing! Invigorating see breezes, salty spray, serenading wash, the calls of seagulls. And, certainly, you could catch a really large fish here!
It seems like this fish has adapted to living in extreme conditions… Its scientific value will be appreciated at the laboratory!
Exotics Lover - win all achievements in Amazon location

Brand Rotan prefers stagnant water and swamps, rivers with muddy bottoms. Brand Rotan reaches a length of 0.8 ft, but the usual size is up to 3, rarely up to 5.5 inches. Brand Rotan is extremely unpretentious and can live and breed in highly polluted water under adverse environmental conditions.
We heard a wild roar somewhere in the thickets, very close to us. I am not usually one to run hell for leather – I just needed to brace myself and get ready to face the danger.
Catch a Dorado weighing 10 kg faster than others!
Endear local residents, throwing some feed in the water.
You'll also need some Gold to pay for the journey!
Simple copper spoon designed for reels. Excellent for checking one's talents!

Every girl dreams of meeting her prince! It may be cool to present this crowned frog to any dreamer! For no matter how long it is kissed, it will refuse to turn into a prince again! Because this one escaped from a princess to croak alone in swamps long ago.
It is really hard to overestimate the importance of flavoured bait when you are going to catch a rare fish like an Amur carp

Medium spinning of the "Bear" series. The price is moderated by high quality and reliability. You may now forget unpleasent sound when your rod is cracking under the weight of fish! The largest bearable fish may even exceed 20 kg, as specified by the manufacturer.

Laboratory assistants say there is one more mysterious creature living in these waters, and ask us for help!
The forester living nearby has said he'll allow us to fish there only if we surpass his fishing mastery!
Who could guess that cruel predators such as pike and eels would have such a sweet tooth? But it's true! So, always take some sugar with you if you go fishing for those toothy creatures!

To complete this quest you need to perform several tasks:
You'll also need some Gold to pay for the journey!
Wow, that's beautiful! Let's see how welcoming are the fishes, which live there.

Owing to their excellent sense of smell they can smell fruit ripening on the shore! They'll start swimming around a tree, waiting for ripe fruit to fall. They won't refuse a couple of shellfish either.
Catch some Pikes in the Moon Bay!

Night fishing is a special treat. Particularly if you are in the untamed wilderness, sitting on the edge of a serene bay with all the stars of the universe mirrored in the water. There's only the chirping of crickets and the occasional splash of a fish to break the silence
A local monk alleges he can catch more fish than you, with the God's blessing! We'll see!
Catch Amur catfish at least 3.2 kg!
It has taken me only twelve hours, and here I am!

Nase are typical river fish eating organic remains that have settled on the bottom and various small creatures that crawl on the stony or hard sandy riverbed. The best nutritional conditions are at a medium depth of 0.4-1.8 meters, where the riverbed is covered by an alga carpet. Nase are shoaling fish that inhabit rapidly flowing deep water, often located near bridges.
Catch fish weighing 6 kg in total! You'll need something to eat during the journey!
[fish type] are definitely biting - I've caught [total weight] in just a couple of hours! I'll be very surprised if you manage to catch the same!

Sky gazers are predatory fish that prefer to swim mainly in the mid waters. They can reach a length of 102cms and weigh up to 9 kg. Sky gazers feed on young crucians and ichs. Their diet includes insect larvae and dayflies during their mass swarming. The mouth of a sky gazer is directed upwards. After reaching 7cm, sky gazers switch to eating fish that have a mainly oblong body shape.
Bring some new species for aquariums: Catch some Osmans!

Baikal omul are the most famous species among cisco fish. Twenty thousand years ago polar oceanic omul swam to Baikal through the Arctic Ocean along the river system and they have inhabited this unique lake since the Ice Age. Unlike many other fish, Baikal omul can live both in salted and fresh water.
You need different lures and baits to catch different kinds of fish! By combining them, you'll get a lot of catch!
Catch some Ciscos in the Mountain Lake!
A cheaper equivalent of Hydra spoon. A well polished nut can be as sinkers and spoon at the same time .
A local spoonbaits producer needs some silver to produce special silver baits. We can be of help!
Urban life has made you meek! You are no match to me when it comes to fishing! Wanna bet?

Night fishing is a particular pleasure, especially when you are in the middle of nowhere, on a quiet bay, the mirrored surface of which reflects the moon and stars. The silence is only broken by the chirr of crickets and rare splashes of water as the fish are biting!
You'll also need some Gold to pay for the journey!
Catch fish weighing 3 kg in total, fishing with Santa!
Catch Rotans on the total weight 2.5 kg!
A local living near the lake has lost an exhibit from his collection of shaped snags!
Catch some Rotans as a gift for Uncle Joe!
A cheaper equivalent of a Worm spoon. The great way to increase the value of small coins - make them something more!
Catch [amount] White Amurs at least [weight] each
Do you remember that I've lost my favourite Teddy bear here last summer... I wonder, what happened to him?
There is a local rumour, which says that only the chosen one can catch the biggest Chum Salmon in this lake! I bet, that's not true!
Wlocal fishermen just laugh at our intention to catch some Eels. Are they really so elusive?
The annual fishing tournament is coming up. Let's show what we're up to, we're here to beat everyone, after all!
Cast yout line several times! It will take some doing to get silver!
Classic spinning from the Nubler Series, which has proved itself with time. An excellent model for starting a serious career in the fishing industry. Allows you to catch 2 kg fish!
The killer-worm is so deadly that only the most dangerous and experienced fish dare to try eating it! Even when stuck on a hook, it can still sometimes catch fish stupid enough to swim too close!
It's time to unite all efforts before the attack! Collect all types of fish soldiers in one squad to make it invincible!
Catch some fish weighing at least 3 kg.
A pretty strong rod for those who don't want their first big fish to get off the hook.

Brand Rotan prefers stagnant water and swamps, rivers with muddy bottoms. Brand Rotan reaches a length of 24 cm, but the usual size is up to 8, rarely up to 14 cm. Brand Rotan is extremely unpretentious and can live and breed in highly polluted water under adverse environmental conditions.
You can buy all you need for fishing from the Shop, which is accessed by clicking on the button in the lower left corner of the screen. Also, you can get some lures and baits by completing quests.

White eye prefers waters with fast and moderate stream, avoiding flood waters. During the feeding keeps in small flocks during the breeding and wintering areas is collected in large flocks. It feeds on aquatic insect larvae, small mollusks, algae and zooplankton. White eye is sensitive to pollution, and can be found only in clean waters.
